dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7383 IH: Feed Our Veterans Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Vasquez (for himself, Mr. Riley of New York, and Mr. Gray) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 to restore the exemption of veterans from a work requirement applicable for participation in the supplemental nutrition assistance program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Feed Our Veterans Act.

section.header: Restoration of exemption of veterans from a work requirement
section.text: Section 6(o)(3) of the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 (7 U.S.C. 2015(o)(3)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (F) by striking or at the end,
in subparagraph (G) by striking the period at the end and inserting ; or, and
by adding at the end the following:
